notes: Passive - scores all <table> elements on the page by row count, column count, and content density, then shows a draggable modal (#tableexport-modal) titled 'Table Export' previewing the best-scoring table with column toggles and a 'Download CSV' button. The Comparison of web browsers article has large wikitables that should score highly.

checks.comment: Modal header text should be present
Preview table should have at least a header row
